mapper.select: SELECT a.*, c.city_name, c.province FROM air_quality_data a LEFT JOIN city c ON a.city_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO air_quality_data(city_id, aqi, quality_level, primary_pollutant, pm25, pm10, so2, no2, co, o3, temperature, humidity, wind_speed, wind_direction, monitor_time, create_time) VALUES(#{cityId}, #{aqi}, #{qualityLevel}, #{primaryPollutant}, #{pm25}, #{pm10}, #{so2}, #{no2}, #{co}, #{o3}, #{temperature}, #{humidity}, #{windSpeed}, #{windDirection}, #{monitorTime}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, c.city_name, c.province FROM air_quality_data a INNER JOIN city c ON a.city_id = c.id INNER JOIN ( SELECT city_id, MAX(monitor_time) AS max_time FROM air_quality_data GROUP BY city_id ) latest ON a.city_id = latest.city_id AND a.monitor_time = latest.max_time ORDER BY a.aqi DESC

SELECT a.*, c.city_name, c.province FROM air_quality_data a LEFT JOIN city c ON a.city_id = c.id WHERE a.city_id = #{cityId} AND a.monitor_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY a.monitor_time ASC
SELECT quality_level AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM air_quality_data GROUP BY quality_level ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT c.city_name AS cityName, ROUND(AVG(a.aqi), 1) AS avgAqi FROM air_quality_data a LEFT JOIN city c ON a.city_id = c.id GROUP BY a.city_id, c.city_name ORDER BY avgAqi ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM air_quality_data WHERE DATE(monitor_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT ROUND(AVG(pm25), 1) AS avgPm25, ROUND(AVG(pm10), 1) AS avgPm10, ROUND(AVG(so2), 1) AS avgSo2, ROUND(AVG(no2), 1) AS avgNo2, ROUND(AVG(co), 2) AS avgCo, ROUND(AVG(o3), 1) AS avgO3, ROUND(AVG(aqi), 0) AS avgAqi FROM air_quality_data
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO air_quality_data(city_id, aqi, quality_level, primary_pollutant, pm25, pm10, so2, no2, co, o3, temperature, humidity, wind_speed, wind_direction, monitor_time, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.cityId}, #{item.aqi}, #{item.qualityLevel}, #{item.primaryPollutant}, #{item.pm25}, #{item.pm10}, #{item.so2}, #{item.no2}, #{item.co}, #{item.o3}, #{item.temperature}, #{item.humidity}, #{item.windSpeed}, #{item.windDirection}, #{item.monitorTime}, NOW())
